description_long: This bird has a streamlined, elongated body with a subtle curve along its back and a slightly pointed tail. Its plumage is predominantly brown with intricate barring and mottling patterns, especially visible on the wings and back. The head is small and rounded, featuring a short, conical beak that is pale at the tip and darker at the base. The underparts are lighter, with a soft gradient from the darker back to the paler belly. The wings are held close to the body, and the tail feathers are neatly aligned, giving the bird a sleek, aerodynamic profile. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body, typical of a bird at rest or in a decoy posture.
description: A brown, streamlined bird with barred plumage, a short conical beak, and a pointed tail, featuring intricate feather patterns and a sleek profile.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, detailed barring on the wings and back, and the subtle curve of the back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical alignment of the tail feathers and the full extent of the barred pattern across the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the bird's profile, beak, and the continuity of the feather pattern.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the transition from the darker back to the lighter underparts.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Barred and mottled with fine stripes and spots across the wings, back, and tail; lighter underparts with subtle gradients.
